summary: Modern, high-converting website for Microhub - an influencer marketing agency in Mumbai connecting micro and nano influencers with brands for barter and paid collaborations. Premium minimal design targeting brand owners as primary audience.
architectural_notes: Premium minimal design with black, white, and bold accent color (electric blue or neon green)
Brand owners as primary target audience - design and messaging prioritize their needs
Mobile-first responsive approach with modern scroll animations
Strong typography emphasis for clean professional look
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Modern creator-focused hero background with young diverse creators using smartphones and cameras, premium minimal style (hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)
- Abstract geometric pattern in accent color for section backgrounds, minimal style (pattern-accent.dim_800x800.png)
- Mumbai cityscape silhouette illustration in minimal line art style (mumbai-skyline.dim_1200x400.png)

existing_features.title: Create a hero section with headline 'Stop Spending Lakhs on Ads. Work With Real Creators.', subtext 'Microhub helps brands grow through micro & nano influencer collaborations that actually convert.', two CTA buttons labeled 'Work With Creators' and 'Join As Creator', and modern creator-focused background visuals
Create a problem section highlighting expensive ad campaigns, low engagement, fake influencer reach, and poor ROI, followed by positioning Microhub as the solution
Create a 'What We Do' section explaining influencer matchmaking, barter & paid campaigns, content-driven brand exposure, and campaign strategy & reporting
Create a 'Why Microhub' section emphasizing focus on micro & nano creators, real engagement over fake followers, Mumbai-focused local targeting, and affordability for small & mid brands
Create a 'How It Works' section with a 4-step process: Step 1 - Brand shares goals, Step 2 - We shortlist creators, Step 3 - Campaign execution, Step 4 - Track performance
Create a creator recruitment section with the message 'Don't chase brands. Let brands discover you.' and a 'Join Microhub' CTA button
Create a testimonials section with placeholders for brand and creator reviews
Create a contact section with a lead form including fields for Name, Brand Name, Budget Range, Contact Number, and Email
Implement mobile-first responsive design across all sections ensuring optimal viewing and interaction on smartphones and tablets
Add Instagram integration component and a WhatsApp contact button that opens WhatsApp chat
Create a clean footer with Mumbai location information and relevant links
Implement modern scroll animations throughout the website for smooth section transitions and element reveals
Implement SEO optimization with appropriate meta tags, structured data, and content optimization targeting the keyword 'Influencer Marketing Agency in Mumbai'
Apply a premium minimal design aesthetic with black, white, and electric blue or neon green accent colors, featuring clean layouts, strong typography, and a style that feels youthful yet professional

new_feature_requests.summary: Hero section with headline, subtext, dual CTAs and creator-focused visuals
Problem section highlighting expensive ads, low engagement, fake reach, poor ROI
What We Do section explaining matchmaking, campaigns, exposure, and reporting
Why Microhub section emphasizing micro/nano focus, real engagement, Mumbai targeting, affordability
How It Works section with 4-step process from goals to performance tracking
Creator recruitment section with Join Microhub CTA
Testimonials section with placeholder for brand and creator reviews
Contact section with lead form (name, brand name, budget, contact, email)
Mobile-first responsive design with modern scroll animations
Instagram integration and WhatsApp contact button
SEO optimization for 'Influencer Marketing Agency in Mumbai'
